title: AutoHeal - User Input Protection: Focus Theft Detection & Auto-Recovery
desc: [RULE] Skill content MUST be in English -- Korean uses 2-3x tokens. Multi-layer system protecting user focus from CDP/Chrome theft during ask operations. LIVING DOCUMENT: update as each incident is investigated and resolved. MANDATORY: all restore paths through InputReadiness pipeline. RESTORE TRIGGER: end of each ask/CDP action boundary only. Watchdog = monitor+notify only.
steps: 0. [RULE] ALL skill steps/desc/tags must be English only -- token efficiency.

1. [MANDATORY] ALL focus restore paths go through InputReadiness.Probe() -- OnProbeSuccess fires zoom+auto-hack. Standalone ForceForegroundWindow without InputReadiness FORBIDDEN (except RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync inner loop).
2. [MANDATORY] Restore trigger = end of each ask/CDP action only. Watchdog = monitor+notify only, no restore.

3. [FOCUSLESS PATTERN] Standard pattern for any CDP call that can steal focus: (a) check if already active (document.visibilityState=visible) -> skip minimize dance, (b) SW_SHOWMINNOACTIVE(8) to iconify, (c) WaitForWindowStateAsync('minimized') -- poll not fixed delay, (d) fire CDP call, (e) RestoreChromeNoActivate (SW_SHOWNOACTIVATE=4), (f) WaitForWindowStateAsync('normal') -- poll not fixed delay. Example: BringToFrontAsync and SwitchToTargetAsync both follow this exact pattern.

4. [INVESTIGATION PROCEDURE] When focus theft suspected: (a) which ask action was running, (b) which CDP method it calls, (c) IsFocusStealingMethod() covers it?, (d) pre-minimize uses SW=8 not 6?, (e) WaitForWindowState used (not fixed delay)?, (f) RestoreChromeNoActivate after?, (g) OnFocusTheft callback restores?

5. [CDP FOCUS-STEALING METHODS] Page.bringToFront, Target.activateTarget (no-op), Browser.setWindowBounds, Runtime.evaluate+.focus(). Gatekeepers: IsFocusStealingMethod() + IsFocusRiskExpression() in CdpClient.FocusRiskWatchdog.cs.
6. [KNOWN INSTABILITY] Runtime.evaluate: JS .focus() bypasses IsFocusStealingMethod. setWindowBounds: Chrome may activate before WaitForWindowState confirms.
12. [DONE] DismissDialogAsync: added 동의 + called after file-attach + before insert
author: claude
